name: Back Squat
description: Barbell squat to parallel or below with braced trunk and neutral spine.

name: Front Squat
description: Barbell squat with front rack position and upright torso.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold a dumbbell or kettlebell at chest and squat with controlled depth.

name: Split Squat
description: Stationary lunge position with controlled lowering and stable knee tracking.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Alternating steps into a lunge with upright torso and balanced gait.

name: Step-Up
description: Step onto a box driving through the whole foot and control the descent.

name: Conventional Deadlift
description: Hip hinge from the floor with braced trunk and strong lockout.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hinge with soft knees and loaded hamstring stretch.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Explosive hip hinge projecting the bell forward with glute drive.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Upper back on bench and drive hips to full extension.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Feet planted and lift hips by squeezing glutes with rib control.

name: Good Morning
description: Barbell on upper back with controlled hip hinge and neutral spine.

name: Bench Press
description: Press barbell from chest with stable shoulder blades.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Press dumbbells with neutral wrists and controlled range.

name: Push-Up
description: Straight-line body and controlled press from the floor.

name: Overhead Press
description: Press bar overhead with stacked ribs and pelvis.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Seated or standing dumbbell press with controlled tempo.

name: Parallel Bar Dip
description: Lower under control and press to lockout without shrugging.

name: Pull-Up
description: Start from dead hang and pull chest up by driving elbows down.

name: Chin-Up
description: Supinated-grip pull-up with controlled body position.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Pull the bar to upper chest while keeping torso stable.

name: Barbell Row
description: Hinge to stable torso angle and row to lower ribs.

name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Support on bench and row toward hip with neutral spine.

name: Face Pull
description: Pull toward face with elbows high and external rotation.

name: Farmer's Carry
description: Walk with heavy implements at sides; stay tall with steady steps.

name: Suitcase Carry
description: Single-side carry resisting lateral flexion.

name: Overhead Carry
description: Carry weight overhead with locked elbow and stacked posture.

name: Plank
description: Forearm plank with rib-down brace and neutral spine.

name: Side Plank
description: Elbow under shoulder with hips lifted in straight line.

name: Pallof Press
description: Anti-rotation press resisting trunk rotation.
